iterations.change: Paragraph splitting at sentence boundaries in route.ts
Middle-dot paragraph separators between internal paragraphs
Middle-dot separators between consecutive body elements
Increased vertical spacing around dot separators
Rewrote enhance-artscroll.js: aggressive Hebrew insertion, em-dash format
Switched to hyphen format, stripped bidi control chars
Fixed eval regex to strip bidi markers (genuine bug)
Widened regex range and added flexible gap matching
Fixed letter name regex for numbers/partial matches
Citation normalization: Chapter->Perek, verse->Pasuk, compact refs expansion
Parenthetical daf conversion: Yoma (53b) -> Maseches Yoma (Daf 53b)
Improved Hebrew prefix: detect incomplete leading Hebrew, replace with full phrase + dash
Terminology normalization: kodshei kodashim case, Mizbeiach Unicode apostrophe fix
